title: Add 11L 448x2 PairHash int8+zstd 10-minute submission record
body:
## Summary
- add a new 10-minute / 16MB-track submission record for an 11-layer 448-dim GQA model with MLP multiplier 2 and PairHash embeddings
- include the exact `train_gpt.py` snapshot, `train.log`, `submission.json`, and README for the winning run
- keep the exported artifact under the 16,000,000-byte cap while materially improving on the older valid reference path

## Key Result
- `final_export_roundtrip_exact val_bpb: 1.36843871`
- `Total submission size export: 15149719 bytes`

## Test Plan
- `python3 -m json.tool records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_11L448x2_PairHash_Int8Zstd/submission.json`
- `grep 'final_export_roundtrip_exact' records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_11L448x2_PairHash_Int8Zstd/train.log`
- `grep 'Total submission size export' records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_11L448x2_PairHash_Int8Zstd/train.log`

comments.body: README says the record uses a "current repository train_gpt.py snapshot", but this folder’s `train_gpt.py` includes PairHash + zstd export logic that is not present in the repository root `train_gpt.py` (no `pairhash` references). To avoid confusion for reproducibility, reword this bullet to say the script is a modified copy / forked snapshot used for the run (optionally include the source commit/hash).
Updated the README wording. It now describes `train_gpt.py` as the modified run-specific snapshot copied into the record folder, rather than the current repository root script.
